─[1]-Project──
lorehq
─[2]-Primitives──
Rules Skills Agents Fieldnotes Runbooks
─[3]-Guides──
CommandsCustomizationGuidesPlatform SupportWorking Across Repos
─[4]-Workflow──
Active Work Architecture
─[ Vaultwarden BW CLI Maintenance ]─ ┐

Vaultwarden BW CLI Maintenance

Purpose

Maintain and audit Vaultwarden items safely using the Bitwarden CLI (bw).

When to Use

  • Normalizing URI match rules across organization items.
  • Bulk updates for Vaultwarden items with repeatable logic.
  • Auditing organization items for missing fields or drift.

URI Match Detection (login.uris[].match)

ValueMatch TypeUse Case
0Base domainDefault
1HostInternal hostnames (FQDNs and shortnames)
2Starts withIP-based URIs on internal services
3ExactSingle specific page

Process

  1. Unlock: Ensure BW_SESSION is loaded.
  2. Sync: Run bw sync to pull the latest data.
  3. Inventory: bw list items or bw list organizations.
  4. Analysis: Use jq to preview changes before applying.
  5. Apply: bw edit item <id> "$(... | bw encode)".

Safety Rules

  • Never print secrets or full payloads to logs.
  • Avoid changing unrelated fields; target only specific updates.
  • Organization item deletion: bw delete item <id> fails for org items. You must use the Vaultwarden web UI to delete organization items.

Reference Paths

  • Env: .env (root, gitignored)
PgUp/PgDn: scroll b: bulk commands q: quit x: menu ← → ↑ ↓: navigate
Donate 0.24.4
